meaning: n.壁炉地面,炉边,家庭(生活),炉膛
examples: He stoked up the fire in the hearth.
A log fire roared in the open hearth.
The embers still glowed in the hearth.
It is baked fresh daily in a hearth oven and remains the exclusive bread of Chez Panisse.
He also signed the HEARTH Act, which strives to rehouse rapidly those who lost their homes.
